description: Scoring weights for lead quality evaluation

factor_descriptions.legitimacy: Business legitimacy - Is company real & active?
factor_descriptions.relevance: Epoxy relevance - Do they work with epoxy/concrete/flooring?
factor_descriptions.opportunity: Market opportunity - Revenue size, employees, growth
factor_descriptions.activity: Recent activity - Reviews, posts, website updates
factor_descriptions.accessibility: Decision maker access - Can we reach owner/decision maker?
factor_descriptions.engagement: Social engagement - Active on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn?
